title: R31 — Anonymous profile: nickname, avatar, gender, preference filter
notes: NEW: Anonymous identity card — pick a nickname (30 chars), choose from 6 avatars (3 girl + 3 boy with distinct gradients), declare your gender.
NEW: Preference filter — match with Girls, Boys, or Anyone. Mutual compatibility enforced server-side (no one-sided matches).
NEW: Interests are now space-to-add (type 'music' + space → chipified). Removed the canned suggestion chips per user request.
NEW: Matched-with screen shows the partner's nickname + their picked avatar emoji + their gender.
PERSISTENT: Your anonymous profile is saved automatically (debounced 600ms) — next time you open Anonymous Connect, it's all pre-filled.
REQUIRES: Migration 0021_anon_profile.sql applied in Supabase (adds anon_nickname, anon_avatar, anon_gender, anon_preference columns + updates matchmaker RPC).
